## Summary

- 

## Checks

- [ ] Ran the smallest meaningful local verification gate, or explained why not.
- [ ] Updated [`TODO.md`](https://github.com/RusDavies/pydecorators/blob/master/TODO.md) for completed or newly discovered work.
- [ ] Added or updated tests for behavior changes.

## Documentation checks

- [ ] Updated [`docs/index.md`](https://github.com/RusDavies/pydecorators/blob/master/docs/index.md) if a top-level docs page or executable example was added, removed, or renamed.
- [ ] Updated executable docs examples and `tests/test_docs_examples.py` together when examples changed.
- [ ] Used the `docs_policy` pytest marker for documentation policy tests.
- [ ] Ran `./scripts/docs-policy.sh` when documentation structure, links, release docs, or examples changed.
- [ ] Confirmed root docs that help users navigate still link to [`docs/index.md`](https://github.com/RusDavies/pydecorators/blob/master/docs/index.md).

## Release-impact checks

- [ ] Updated [`RELEASE.md`](https://github.com/RusDavies/pydecorators/blob/master/RELEASE.md) if release gates, publishing flow, package metadata, or persistent cache compatibility changed.
- [ ] Confirmed no secrets, tokens, built distributions, local virtualenvs, or cache databases are included.
